title: FUGUEの実装を確認し、Kernelとの差分を埋めて。ただしFUGUE/kernel両方の既存のシステムを損壊しないように慎重に実装をマルチエージェントで進めて。
summary_text: - **High**: Local run comment pipeline explicitly strips context-reference audit lines before posting to the issue, so operators on GitHub cannot see whether a context reference was generated or what attach command was used. The data is generated, then removed from the posted comment. [run-local-orchestration.sh#L1135](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1135) [run-local-orchestration.sh#L1137](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1137) [run-local-orchestration.sh#L1156](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1156) [run-local-orchestration.sh#L1157](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1157) - **High**: `attach-context` has no GitHub-visible audit surface (no issue comment, no workflow summary update). It only mutates compact artifact and prints local stdout, so remote operators cannot confirm attachment happened from workflow records alone. [codex-kernel-guard.sh#L663](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L663) [codex-kernel-guard.sh#L669](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L669) [kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L549](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L549) [kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L600](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L600) - **Medium**: Handoff correlation metadata is generated but not exposed in operator-facing records. `dispatch_nonce` is created and used for dispatch, but omitted from handoff issue comment and `GITHUB_OUTPUT`; adapter return markers are also discarded via stdout redirection. This makes it harder to tie an issue handoff to a specific workflow dispatch during incident review. [route-task-handoff.sh#L508](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L508) [route-task-handoff.sh#L499](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L499) [route-task-handoff.sh#L604](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L604) [route-task-handoff.sh#L610](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L610) [fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L326](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L326) [fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L353](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L353)
